name: 05_metrics_contract_transport_dev_transport_aklw
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_aklw' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_asset' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DeltaUTC|ModifiedUTC|ExportDateUTC|ModifiedUser|ConstructionDate|DisposalDate|ConditionDate' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_aklw`.`uvw_asset`
UNION ALL
